fields.name: Migration Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of data migration.

fields.name: Total Number
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total number of records that were migrated.

fields.name: Migrated Number
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of records that were migrated.

fields.name: Progress Percent
fields.tooltip: Specifies the progress of the data migration.

fields.name: Status
fields.tooltip: Specifies the status of the data migration.

fields.name: Error Count
fields.tooltip: Specifies how many records could not be migrated because of an error.
